propositions: Change the main branch submit type from fast-forward-only to rebase-if-necessary so Gerrit rebases server-side at submit.
Retire the Autosubmit label definition, its ACL, and the bot-only rebase-on-behalf grant that are no longer needed.
Revisit and document the Verified copyCondition so the submit requirement still gates on Verified+1 and LLM-Review+1 under the new submit type.
Update setup-project.sh and smoke-check to drop references to the removed label and ACL.
Apply the config live via admin key in a quiet window with a DRY_RUN diff first, confirming submit type is REBASE_IF_NECESSARY and the Autosubmit label is gone.
Verify a clean change lands via plain Submit while a textual-conflict change is refused with a rebase-manually signal, keeping a one-line back-out to fast-forward-only.
